start:
Hi! Send me an article link — I'll load it in reader mode (no ads, banners, or comments) and ask which format to save it in.

Just paste the URL and send.
/history — view saved articles.
/find {arg} — search by title.
/link — connect Chrome extension.
/settings — language and preferences.
/help — full guide.
not_a_url: This doesn't look like a link. Send a URL starting with http:// or https://
history_empty: History is empty. Send an article link — I'll save it.
article_not_found: ❌ Article not found. Send the link again.
server_error: ❌ Could not reach the server. Try again.
unexpected_error: ❌ An unexpected error occurred. Try again.
link_generated: 🔗 Code to connect the extension: {code} Enter it in the Chrome extension settings. Valid for 10 minutes. Or send me a 6-character code from the extension to connect it to your account.
link_generate_error: ❌ Could not generate code. Try again.
link_preview: 🔗 Merge preview Your group: {your_users} account(s), {your_articles} articles Other group: {code_users} account(s), {code_articles} articles After merge: {total_users} accounts, {total_articles} articles All articles will become shared. Continue?
link_already_same: ℹ️ These accounts are already in the same group.
share_generated: 📤 Article transfer code: {code} Send it to another user. One-time code — valid until used.
share_revoke_error: ❌ Code already used or not found.
share_received: ✅ Article added to your history! {title} Choose format:
err_not_html: The link leads to a non-HTML page (possibly an image or file).
err_no_content: Could not extract article text — possibly paywalled or requires login.
err_timeout: Request timed out. The site is responding too slowly.
err_request: Could not connect to the site.
err_expired_code: Code has expired. Generate a new one.
err_share_invalid: Code not found or already used.
err_share_not_owner: Code not found or does not belong to you.
help: 📖 Reader Bot — Help Basic usage Send any article URL — the bot fetches it in reader mode (no ads, banners, or comments) and offers 4 formats to save: • 📄 PDF — clean page, ready to print • 📝 Markdown — plain text • 🌐 HTML — with styles, opens in browser • 📚 EPUB — for e-readers History and search /history — browse all saved articles (paginated) /find word — search by title Connecting Chrome extension 1. Install the Reader Bot extension 2. In extension settings, enter your API URL 3. Send /link in the bot — you'll get a 6-character code 4. Enter the code in the extension (or vice versa) Merging accounts If you use the bot on Telegram and the extension in a browser, you can link them so all articles are shared: 1. Send /link in the bot — copy the code 2. Enter the code in the extension's Link section or 3. In the extension, click «Generate code» — copy the code 4. Send that code to the bot After merging — all articles from both accounts become shared. Sharing an article 1. Select an article from /history (or send a URL) 2. Press 📤 Share — you'll get an 8-character code 3. Send the code to another user 4. They send the code to the bot — the article is added to their history The code is one-time and valid until used. /settings — change language
delete_confirm: 🗑️ Delete article {title}? This cannot be undone.
